title: Nocil is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Nocil is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Quality Control Engineer looking for your next big career move? Nocil in Delhi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Nocil:
Nocil is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nocil!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
